ddls:
CREATE TABLE "bugs" (
  "bug_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bug */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the bug is related to */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the bug is related to */,
  "assignee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer assigned to the bug */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current status of the bug */,
  "resolution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resolution of the bug */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version where the bug was found */,
  "priority_id" INTEGER /* ID of the priority level assigned to the bug */,
  "severity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the severity level assigned to the bug */,
  "reported_by_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reported the bug */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the bug was reported */,
  "last_modified_by_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the bug */,
  "duplicate_of_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bug this bug is a duplicate of */,
  "blocking_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bug this bug is blocking */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the bug */,
  "changed" TEXT /* Date and time the bug was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bug_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bugs_priority_id FOREIGN KEY ("priority_id") REFERENCES priorities ("priority_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bugs_resolution_id FOREIGN KEY ("resolution_id") REFERENCES resolutions ("resolution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bugs_duplicate_of_id FOREIGN KEY ("duplicate_of_id") REFERENCES bugs ("bug_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bugs_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bugs_last_modified_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bugs_reported_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("reported_by_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bugs_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bugs_blocking_id FOREIGN KEY ("blocking_id") REFERENCES bugs ("bug_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bugs_severity_id FOREIGN KEY ("severity_id") REFERENCES severities ("severity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bugs_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bugs_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bugs_assignee_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignee_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current version of the product */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the component belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "developers" (
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each developer */,
  "developer_name" TEXT /* Name of the developer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the developer */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role of the developer */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("developer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_developers_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the status is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resolutions" (
  "resolution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resolution */,
  "resolution_name" TEXT /* Name of the resolution */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the resolution */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the resolution is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resolution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "bug_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bug the comment is related to */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer who added the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was added */,
  "is_visible" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment is visible to all users */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_bug_id FOREIGN KEY ("bug_id") REFERENCES bugs ("bug_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("developer_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attachments" (
  "attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment */,
  "bug_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bug the attachment is related to */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer who added the attachment */,
  "attachment_file" TEXT /* File name of the attachment */,
  "attachment_date" TEXT /* Date and time the attachment was added */,
  "file_size" TEXT /* Size of the attachment */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the attachment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attachments_bug_id FOREIGN KEY ("bug_id") REFERENCES bugs ("bug_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attachments_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("developer_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "bug_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bug that depends on another bug */,
  "dependent_bug_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bug that is depended on */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the dependency (e.g., blocks, depends on, duplicates) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependencies_dependent_bug_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependent_bug_id") REFERENCES bugs ("bug_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependencies_bug_id FOREIGN KEY ("bug_id") REFERENCES bugs ("bug_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the product */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product this version belongs to */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "priorities" (
  "priority_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each priority level */,
  "priority_name" TEXT /* Name of the priority level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the priority level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("priority_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "severities" (
  "severity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each severity level */,
  "severity_name" TEXT /* Name of the severity level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the severity level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("severity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
